name: Roger Williams
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $195,452 for Roger Williams in U.S. House, TX-25. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
